pipeline_status.curmudgeon: 3 pending reviews processed this run (pending-digest.json:pending_count=3): WIN-009.c4 (1 major, 2 minor), WIN-017.c6 (3 moderate, 2 minor), WIN-028.c8 (verification pass, 3 minor). internal_issues.description: Grammar bug introduced by ISS-1867 patch: detail_verdict_text had 'a field-specific published dataset published MT and ELF spectral literature' — two noun phrases concatenated without connector. Breaks symmetry with 17 other post-hoc WINs.
internal_issues.patch_summary: Restored parentheses: 'dataset (published MT and ELF spectral literature)'

internal_issues.description: NH parallax 'scale precisely with each star's distance' overclaims. Distance ratio Wolf/Proxima=1.854 vs parallax ratio 32.4/15.7=2.064 — 11% discrepancy. (WIN-017.c6.json:holes_found[0]:quantitative_verification)

Throop et al. 2020 RNAAS citation linked to NASA press release, not the journal (DOI 10.3847/2515-5172/ab9088). Symmetry violation — we criticize dome for citation mismatches. (WIN-017.c6.json:holes_found[1]:citation_check)
internal_issues.patch_summary: Replaced NASA press URL with DOI 10.3847/2515-5172/ab9088

internal_issues.description: Spectroscopic-class independence argument doesn't acknowledge Hyades-parallax anchoring. Dome defender can argue parallax dependence shifted one rung not eliminated. Added clause closes structural escape hatch. (WIN-017.c6.json:holes_found[2])
internal_issues.patch_summary: Added Hyades-anchor clause noting dome wobble predicts flat amplitude regardless of calibration rung

internal_issues.description: WIN-009 detail_evidence: c3/c4 carry-over harmonic quantitative line not added. Suggested: 'Measured Schumann harmonics span 7.83, 14.3, 20.8, 27.3, 33.8 Hz; all four harmonics above 11.7 Hz are observed...' for standalone readability.
TLDR '(~5%)' implies dome published a general 5% threshold it never adopted. Self-applied fix. (WIN-028.c8.json:holes_found[0])
Finding field '~3x dome's 5.3% threshold' attributes published threshold rule that doesn't exist. Self-applied fix. (WIN-028.c8.json:holes_found[1])
TLDR final sentence drops 'or tolerance' from c7-H1 recommendation. Low priority polish. (WIN-028.c8.json:holes_found[2])

summary: Productive run: processed 3 curmudgeon reviews (WIN-009.c4, WIN-017.c6, WIN-028.c8). Self-applied 6 patches (1 major grammar fix, 3 moderate argument/citation improvements, 2 minor attribution fixes). Major WIN-028 tracker cleanup: 10 W1 issues closed per c8 verification, 9 W2 duplicate-in-both-trackers removed from open, 1 wontfix (ISS-1849 dup). EXP-308 integrated (verification-only).
